completion_data.completion_summary: Systematic codebase review: renamed ~385 snake_case defs to camelCase across Foundations/Logics, added ~100 docstrings to 6 worst-gap files, rewrote ORGANISATION.md to reflect actual architecture, annotated ~20 sorry stubs with blocking task references, added copyright headers to 4 barrel files, named 7 bare sections, fixed 3 missing Cslib.Init imports, passed all CI validation tools
